channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: About 14% of adults worldwide suffer from tinnitus, often de…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
About 14% of adults worldwide suffer from tinnitus, often described as ringing in the ears. The long-held belief that patients should simply live with it is finally beginning to change. Read more: bloom.bg/4pgig8C

📷️: Martin Lewis
item.content:encoded:
About 14% of adults worldwide suffer from tinnitus, often described as ringing in the ears. The long-held belief that patients should simply live with it is finally beginning to change. Read more: bloom.bg/4pgig8C

📷️: Martin Lewis

item.title: Casting celebrities to play themselves is a high-wire act of…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Casting celebrities to play themselves is a high-wire act of delicate alchemy. “Poking fun at myself is something I love doing,” Jon Hamm said on his recent role in “Gail Daughtry and the Celebrity Sex Pass.”
item.content:encoded: Casting celebrities to play themselves is a high-wire act of delicate alchemy. “Poking fun at myself is something I love doing,” Jon Hamm said on his recent role in “Gail Daughtry and the Celebrity Sex Pass.”

item.title: 【今日の天気予報】 今日12日(日)は北日本で雨の降る所が多く、特に東北は日本海側を中心に大雨のおそれがあります。関東か…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【今日の天気予報】
今日12日(日)は北日本で雨の降る所が多く、特に東北は日本海側を中心に大雨のおそれがあります。関東から東海、近畿も雲が多くなりそうです。九州では晴れて猛暑が続き、熱中症に最大限の警戒が必要になります。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...
item.content:encoded:
【今日の天気予報】
今日12日(日)は北日本で雨の降る所が多く、特に東北は日本海側を中心に大雨のおそれがあります。関東から東海、近畿も雲が多くなりそうです。九州では晴れて猛暑が続き、熱中症に最大限の警戒が必要になります。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...

item.title: Heatwave conditions in England and Wales to continue into ne…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: Heatwave conditions in England and Wales to continue into next week, says Met Office
item.content:encoded: Heatwave conditions in England and Wales to continue into next week, says Met Office

item.title: Rachel never took much notice of the comments on her TikTok …
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Rachel never took much notice of the comments on her TikTok videos until one comment stopped her in her tracks.
item.content:encoded: Rachel never took much notice of the comments on her TikTok videos until one comment stopped her in her tracks.

item.title: Minnesota’s large Muslim and Somali communities expressed in…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Minnesota’s large Muslim and Somali communities expressed indignation that President Trump was again vilifying them after he reposted a video of a kindergarten promotion ceremony in the state, which included comments noting the girls were in hijabs.
item.content:encoded: Minnesota’s large Muslim and Somali communities expressed indignation that President Trump was again vilifying them after he reposted a video of a kindergarten promotion ceremony in the state, which included comments noting the girls were in hijabs.

item.title: ☔️🌱🌺☀️ 空に向かってまっすぐ伸びた茎に、色鮮やかな花を咲かせる「タチアオイ」。 花が下から順番に咲き上がる様子…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
☔️🌱🌺☀️
空に向かってまっすぐ伸びた茎に、色鮮やかな花を咲かせる「タチアオイ」。
花が下から順番に咲き上がる様子から、「一番上まで咲くと梅雨明け」ともいわれ、梅雨入りや梅雨明けの目安になる花として親しまれています。
その特徴や梅雨との関係をご紹介します。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...
item.content:encoded:
☔️🌱🌺☀️
空に向かってまっすぐ伸びた茎に、色鮮やかな花を咲かせる「タチアオイ」。
花が下から順番に咲き上がる様子から、「一番上まで咲くと梅雨明け」ともいわれ、梅雨入りや梅雨明けの目安になる花として親しまれています。
その特徴や梅雨との関係をご紹介します。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...

item.title: Martha Lillard had just turned 5 when she was diagnosed with…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description:
Martha Lillard had just turned 5 when she was diagnosed with polio and depended on an iron lung to live.

She died on June 26 in Oklahoma, the last U.S. polio patient who used the machine, her sister said. She was 78. https://cnn.it/4y85Bsi
item.content:encoded:
Martha Lillard had just turned 5 when she was diagnosed with polio and depended on an iron lung to live.

She died on June 26 in Oklahoma, the last U.S. polio patient who used the machine, her sister said. She was 78. https://cnn.it/4y85Bsi

item.title: Lung cancer remains the leading cause of cancer deaths in th…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Lung cancer remains the leading cause of cancer deaths in the U.S. and older adults are at higher risk. But only about a quarter of patients eligible for screening are up-to-date.
item.content:encoded: Lung cancer remains the leading cause of cancer deaths in the U.S. and older adults are at higher risk. But only about a quarter of patients eligible for screening are up-to-date.

item.title: Our beauty writer went on a quest to find the best self-tann…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Our beauty writer went on a quest to find the best self-tanner for deep skin. "Those same friends of mine who weren’t convinced we could use tanners have also noticed the difference and now come to me for recommendations." nyti.ms/4wB6yrJ
item.content:encoded: Our beauty writer went on a quest to find the best self-tanner for deep skin. "Those same friends of mine who weren’t convinced we could use tanners have also noticed the difference and now come to me for recommendations." nyti.ms/4wB6yrJ

item.title: #🔖政治と経済 米、「種の保存法」見直し 開発優先、生息地の破壊容認 【ワシントン共同】トランプ米政権は10日、絶滅…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖政治と経済
米、「種の保存法」見直し　開発優先、生息地の破壊容認

【ワシントン共同】トランプ米政権は10日、絶滅の危機にある動植物の保護について定めた「種の保存法」の規定を見直すと発表した。絶滅危惧種に直接危害を加えなければ、土地や水域の開発をエネルギー会社などに認める。生息地の破壊が容認され、約半世紀続いた規制が大幅に後退する。 気候変動対策など環境規制を弱め、...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖政治と経済
米、「種の保存法」見直し　開発優先、生息地の破壊容認

【ワシントン共同】トランプ米政権は10日、絶滅の危機にある動植物の保護について定めた「種の保存法」の規定を見直すと発表した。絶滅危惧種に直接危害を加えなければ、土地や水域の開発をエネルギー会社などに認める。生息地の破壊が容認され、約半世紀続いた規制が大幅に後退する。 気候変動対策など環境規制を弱め、...

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com “A straight man’s appearance see…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“A straight man’s appearance seems to be an increasingly important expression of his masculinity,” Kate Manne writes in a guest essay. “I suggest the male gaze, long trained on women, is turning on straight men too.”
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“A straight man’s appearance seems to be an increasingly important expression of his masculinity,” Kate Manne writes in a guest essay. “I suggest the male gaze, long trained on women, is turning on straight men too.”

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム みいちゃんと山田さん | 【第35話(1)】魔法のお菓子 / マガポケ | 少年マガジン公式無料漫…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
みいちゃんと山田さん | 【第35話(1)】魔法のお菓子 / マガポケ | 少年マガジン公式無料漫画アプリ

みいちゃんと山田さん亜月ねねUP次回更新は7/12(日曜)予定です。 無料話更新：隔週日曜 最新話更新：隔週日曜 2012年、新宿。夜の街でキャバクラ嬢として働く山田さんは、何をやってもダメダメな新人・みいちゃんと出会う。ヤル気と元気はあるものの、漢字も空気も読めないみいちゃんは、周りから馬鹿にされ「可哀想」の...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
みいちゃんと山田さん | 【第35話(1)】魔法のお菓子 / マガポケ | 少年マガジン公式無料漫画アプリ

みいちゃんと山田さん亜月ねねUP次回更新は7/12(日曜)予定です。 無料話更新：隔週日曜 最新話更新：隔週日曜 2012年、新宿。夜の街でキャバクラ嬢として働く山田さんは、何をやってもダメダメな新人・みいちゃんと出会う。ヤル気と元気はあるものの、漢字も空気も読めないみいちゃんは、周りから馬鹿にされ「可哀想」の...

item.title: Movies still come on Blu-ray, music is still pressed on viny…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Movies still come on Blu-ray, music is still pressed on vinyl and books still fill store shelves. But as Sony moves to phase out physical PlayStation releases, many gamers are asking why video games should be the first major entertainment medium to go all digital.
item.content:encoded: Movies still come on Blu-ray, music is still pressed on vinyl and books still fill store shelves. But as Sony moves to phase out physical PlayStation releases, many gamers are asking why video games should be the first major entertainment medium to go all digital.

item.title: Summer fires in southern Europe are nothing new, but they ar…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Summer fires in southern Europe are nothing new, but they are happening earlier in the year and are of growing intensity, according to researchers. https://cnn.it/4yhMrAa
item.content:encoded: Summer fires in southern Europe are nothing new, but they are happening earlier in the year and are of growing intensity, according to researchers. https://cnn.it/4yhMrAa

旧暦5月28日　友引
丁亥（ひのと い）
十二直 さだん

潮回り 中潮

正午月相 25.5

2026年7月12日(日)
旧暦5月28日　友引

潮回り 中潮
正午月齢 27.0
正午月相 25.5

item.author: Fox News - Breaking News Updates | Latest News Headlines | Phot… (@foxnews.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー GitHub - yusukebe/ax: The AI-era curl The AI-era …
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
GitHub - yusukebe/ax: The AI-era curl

The AI-era curl: fetch, discover, extract. One command. ax is what a coding agent should reach for instead of curl piped into a throwaway parsing script. It fetches a page, helps the agent understand its structure, and extracts structured data — local
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
GitHub - yusukebe/ax: The AI-era curl

The AI-era curl: fetch, discover, extract. One command. ax is what a coding agent should reach for instead of curl piped into a throwaway parsing script. It fetches a page, helps the agent understand its structure, and extracts structured data — local

item.title: England manager Thomas Tuchel faces serious consequences if …
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: England manager Thomas Tuchel faces serious consequences if his team can't defeat Norway in the World Cup quarterfinals.
item.content:encoded: England manager Thomas Tuchel faces serious consequences if his team can't defeat Norway in the World Cup quarterfinals.
